message.content:
@startuml
actor ":读者" as Reader
actor ":图书管理员" as Librarian
participant "还书界面" as ReturnInterface
participant ":还书信息" as ReturnInfo
participant ":系统" as System

loop
    Reader -> Librarian: 1.取消预定
    activate Librarian
    Librarian -> ReturnInterface: 2.处理图书
    activate ReturnInterface
    ReturnInterface -> ReturnInfo: 3.获取图书信息
    activate ReturnInfo
    ReturnInfo --> ReturnInterface: 4.图书信息
    deactivate ReturnInfo
    ReturnInterface -> System: 5.删除预定记录
    activate System
    System -> System: 6.删除预定记录
    System --> ReturnInterface: 7.删除预定成功
    deactivate System
    ReturnInterface --> Librarian: 8.处理图成功
    deactivate ReturnInterface
    Librarian --> Reader: 9.取消预定成功
    deactivate Librarian
end

@enduml
